narratives.Overview: Add auto-fix capability to marky. Rules opt in by supplying a `fix` handler that patches the mdast in place; remark-stringify serializes the corrected AST back to disk. The CLI gains a --fix flag. Ships with 3-4 safe mechanical fixers: MD009 trailing spaces, MD010 hard tabs, blank lines around headings (MD022/MD032).

items.title: Define Fixable plugin interface: rule may export a `fix` transformer in addition to a `check` reporter
`lintString` / `lintFile` gain a `fix: boolean` option; when true, run fix transformers and return patched content alongside violations
`marky lint --fix` rewrites files in place using remark-stringify; prints count of fixed violations and remaining unfixable ones
Dry-run mode: `marky lint --fix --dry-run` shows what would change without writing files
MD009 trailing-spaces auto-fixer implemented in @marky/core or new @marky/rules package
Tests: fix mode rewrites content correctly; dry-run does not touch files; unfixable violations still reported; exit code reflects remaining errors
